title: [codereview] appendix-schc.md table uses approximate sizes; add exact byte calculation from BitWriter residue
description: The table now lists 26/42 bytes but test vectors show 33/49 because of tail inclusion and bit packing. Add a function or note for precise residue size. Rules.rs still has empty fields arrays - populate from Python rules.py to make it source of truth. Priority P2. Discovered during codereview-pass-1 for project-LICHEN-upk9.
notes: Fixed table in spec/appendix-schc.md with precise SCHC header sizes derived from residue_bit_length + padding via BitWriter (198/326/176/312/416 bits for rules 0-4). Updated column, added test vector sizes column, clarified tail inclusion, referenced codec functions and rules.rs stub. Performed 3 codereview passes via review epic project-LICHEN-u4pp (no P0-P2 findings after final pass). rules.rs population noted as separate P2.
close_reason: Table precision fixed with exact BitWriter/residue_byte_length calculations matching test vectors; 3 codereview passes completed via project-LICHEN-u4pp with no P0-P2 findings; rules.rs population noted as follow-up
